snippet.title: The Shocking Past of Elevance Health!
snippet.description:
Elevance Health is a healthcare company that has been in operation for over 20 years. However, the company's past is anything but commendable. In this video, we're going to explore the shocking past of Elevance Health and how it has affected the company today.

snippet.title: LAYOFF NEWS: CVS Health Laying Off 5K Employees, Armstrong Teasdale Announced Reduction In Force
snippet.description:
CVS Health will be undergoing a layoff impacting 5K employees across the United States. A CVS spokesperson said that the layoffs are part of an enterprise initiative to reprioritize investments around care delivery and technology.

Armstrong Teasdale, a Big law firm based in the St. Louis area, has announced a major reduction in force impacting 6% of the firms staff and 3% of its attorneys – 24 staff and 11 attorneys.

To learn more about our outplacement services, visit: https://employmentboost.com/outplacement-service-costs-and-pricing/ #jobs #layoffs

To learn more about our services, visit https://employmentboost.com.

Do you have a career or jobs-related question you'd like our team to answer? Submit your questions here to be featured in a future episode: https://employmentboost.com/career-question-submission/

snippet.title: MCG Care Guidelines and Social Determinants of Health
snippet.description: Sejal Patel, MD, the System Medical Director for Novant Health, discusses the value of MCG's social determinants of health (SDOH) assessments available within the MCG care guidelines. These assessments help her hospital system: (1) reduce readmissions, (2) capture Complication/Comorbidity (CC) and Major Complications/Comorbidities (MCC); (3) support clinical documentation improvement (CDI); (4) and line up community resources for a safe patient discharge. Learn more about how MCG can help hospital systems: https://www.mcg.com/how-we-help/providers/indicia-evidence-based-clinical-decision-support-for-providers/
